title: Ukrainian drones deliver robots directly into battle by sea and air
excerpt: Ukraine's battlefield surge of robots now features airdrops and beach assaults.
content_html:
In the latest twist on battlefield innovations, Ukraine has used both flying drone carriers and drone boats to send ground robots armed with weapons or explosives into battle.

The drone-assisted deployments have enabled slower wheeled robots to bypass tough terrain and Russian defenses, and to carry out an unusual robotic amphibious assault on a contested position. Such tactics also showcase the Ukrainian military’s ongoing experimentation with using drones and robots to offset a Russian military advantage in manpower while also sparing Ukrainian soldiers from making dangerous assaults.

On July 19, a Russian military Telegram channel posted a video showing a Ukrainian hexacopter drone carrying a ground robot suspended below by a cable, according to the Ukrainian government-run news platform United24. The Russian Telegram channel described the Ukrainian heavy bomber drone as deploying a four-wheeled ARK-1 robot armed with explosive anti-tank mines on the ground where it continued toward Russian military positions—and apparently generated plenty of outraged comments from pro-Kremlin social media users.

It’s unclear how successful that particular mission was. But the tactic could improve the survivability of ground robots by helping them evade Russian aerial surveillance and drone strikes while closing with their targets more quickly. The ARK-1 robot can roll along at a top speed of nearly 28 miles per hour, although some robots are considerably slower.

Ukrainian ground robots also joined a Ukrainian military operation on June 25 that targeted the Kinburn Spit, a sandy and narrow peninsula that extends westward into the Black Sea and is connected to the Russian-occupied left bank of the Kherson Oblast.

Russian military forces captured the Kinburn Spit in June 2022 and set up positions there to help control southern Ukraine’s port access to the Black Sea, although they began withdrawing from the peninsula in early June as Ukraine’s mid- and long-range drone strike campaigns strained Russian supply lines.

sentences.zh: 这种战术还展示了乌克兰军方正在进行的实验，即使用无人机和机器人来抵消俄罗斯在人力方面的军事优势，同时避免乌克兰士兵进行危险的袭击。

blocks.html_en: On July 19, a Russian military Telegram channel posted a video showing a Ukrainian hexacopter drone carrying a ground robot suspended below by a cable, according to the Ukrainian government-run news platform United24. The Russian Telegram channel described the Ukrainian heavy bomber drone as deploying a four-wheeled ARK-1 robot armed with explosive anti-tank mines on the ground where it continued toward Russian military positions—and apparently generated plenty of outraged comments from pro-Kremlin social media users.

sentences.en: On July 19, a Russian military Telegram channel posted a video showing a Ukrainian hexacopter drone carrying a ground robot suspended below by a cable, according to the Ukrainian government-run news platform United24.
sentences.zh: 据乌克兰政府运营的新闻平台 United24 报道，7 月 19 日，俄罗斯军事 Telegram 频道发布了一段视频，显示一架乌克兰六旋翼无人机载着一个用电缆悬挂在下方的地面机器人。

sentences.en: The Russian Telegram channel described the Ukrainian heavy bomber drone as deploying a four-wheeled ARK-1 robot armed with explosive anti-tank mines on the ground where it continued toward Russian military positions—and apparently generated plenty of outraged comments from pro-Kremlin social media users.
sentences.zh: 俄罗斯 Telegram 频道称，这架乌克兰重型轰炸机无人机在地面上部署了一台配备爆炸性反坦克地雷的四轮 ARK-1 机器人，并继续向俄罗斯军事阵地袭来，这显然引起了亲克里姆林宫社交媒体用户的大量愤怒评论。

But the tactic could improve the survivability of ground robots by helping them evade Russian aerial surveillance and drone strikes while closing with their targets more quickly. The ARK-1 robot can roll along at a top speed of nearly 28 miles per hour, although some robots are considerably slower.

sentences.en: It’s unclear how successful that particular mission was.
sentences.zh: 目前尚不清楚该特定任务有多成功。

sentences.en: But the tactic could improve the survivability of ground robots by helping them evade Russian aerial surveillance and drone strikes while closing with their targets more quickly.
sentences.zh: 但这种策略可以帮助地面机器人躲避俄罗斯空中监视和无人机袭击，同时更快地接近目标，从而提高地面机器人的生存能力。

sentences.en: The ARK-1 robot can roll along at a top speed of nearly 28 miles per hour, although some robots are considerably slower.
sentences.zh: ARK-1 机器人可以以每小时近 28 英里的最高速度滚动，尽管有些机器人速度要慢得多。

sentences.en: Ukrainian ground robots also joined a Ukrainian military operation on June 25 that targeted the Kinburn Spit, a sandy and narrow peninsula that extends westward into the Black Sea and is connected to the Russian-occupied left bank of the Kherson Oblast.
sentences.zh: 6月25日，乌克兰地面机器人也参加了乌克兰的军事行动，目标是金伯恩沙嘴，这是一个向西延伸到黑海的狭窄沙质半岛，与俄罗斯占领的赫尔松州左岸相连。

blocks.html_en: Russian military forces captured the Kinburn Spit in June 2022 and set up positions there to help control southern Ukraine’s port access to the Black Sea, although they began withdrawing from the peninsula in early June as Ukraine’s mid- and long-range drone strike campaigns strained Russian supply lines.

sentences.en: Russian military forces captured the Kinburn Spit in June 2022 and set up positions there to help control southern Ukraine’s port access to the Black Sea, although they began withdrawing from the peninsula in early June as Ukraine’s mid- and long-range drone strike campaigns strained Russian supply lines.
sentences.zh: 俄罗斯军队于 2022 年 6 月占领了金伯恩沙嘴，并在那里建立了阵地，以帮助控制乌克兰南部通往黑海的港口通道，尽管由于乌克兰的中远程无人机袭击行动使俄罗斯补给线紧张，俄罗斯军队于 6 月初开始从该半岛撤军。

content_html_zh:
在战场创新的最新转折中，乌克兰使用飞行无人机航母和无人机船将携带武器或爆炸物的地面机器人送入战斗。

无人机辅助部署使速度较慢的轮式机器人能够绕过崎岖的地形和俄罗斯的防御工事，并对有争议的阵地进行不寻常的机器人两栖攻击。 这种战术还展示了乌克兰军方正在进行的实验，即使用无人机和机器人来抵消俄罗斯在人力方面的军事优势，同时避免乌克兰士兵进行危险的袭击。

据乌克兰政府运营的新闻平台 United24 报道，7 月 19 日，俄罗斯军事 Telegram 频道发布了一段视频，显示一架乌克兰六旋翼无人机载着一个用电缆悬挂在下方的地面机器人。 俄罗斯 Telegram 频道称，这架乌克兰重型轰炸机无人机在地面上部署了一台配备爆炸性反坦克地雷的四轮 ARK-1 机器人，并继续向俄罗斯军事阵地袭来，这显然引起了亲克里姆林宫社交媒体用户的大量愤怒评论。

目前尚不清楚该特定任务有多成功。 但这种策略可以帮助地面机器人躲避俄罗斯空中监视和无人机袭击，同时更快地接近目标，从而提高地面机器人的生存能力。 ARK-1 机器人可以以每小时近 28 英里的最高速度滚动，尽管有些机器人速度要慢得多。

6月25日，乌克兰地面机器人也参加了乌克兰的军事行动，目标是金伯恩沙嘴，这是一个向西延伸到黑海的狭窄沙质半岛，与俄罗斯占领的赫尔松州左岸相连。

俄罗斯军队于 2022 年 6 月占领了金伯恩沙嘴，并在那里建立了阵地，以帮助控制乌克兰南部通往黑海的港口通道，尽管由于乌克兰的中远程无人机袭击行动使俄罗斯补给线紧张，俄罗斯军队于 6 月初开始从该半岛撤军。
